title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries for pulling and running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with GPU/CPU inference.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models in chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (chat-ui) that talks to local Ollama; folders, share, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama REST endpoints; Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chat & generate endpoints.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Interactive Go CLI with syntax highlighting, conversation history, markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-compatible server for VS Code.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama CodeLlama for inline autocomplete.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose with CUDA runtime and WebUI container.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama.

title: ollama-experiments
summary: Collection of notebooks benchmarking latency, throughput, quantization of Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into channels with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot using Bolt framework to chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal RAG chatbot template with Streamlit, Chroma, and Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for summarizing notes and Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-mcp-server
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop & friends.
